message.content:
I need to carefully fix the lwl/lwr/swl/swr implementations. Let me verify the current state and apply correct LE implementations:

{
  "analysis": "Need to fix lwl/lwr/swl/swr with correct little-endian MIPS semantics. The current implementations have swapped byte offset cases.",
  "plan": "Fix all four unaligned load/store instructions with correct LE byte ordering.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 << 'PYEOF'
with open('/app/vm.js', 'r') as f:
    c = f.read()

# Correct LE implementations:
# lwl: loads from addr to end of word (high bytes on LE)
# bo=0: full word, bo=1: 3 high bytes, bo=2: 2 high bytes, bo=3: 1 high byte
old_lwl = 'case 34: { const a = (R[rs] + si) >>> 0, al = a & ~3, bo = a & 3, mv = r32(al); R[rt] = bo === 3 ? mv : bo === 2 ? ((mv & 0xFFFFFF00) | (R[rt] & 0x000000FF)) >>> 0 : bo === 1 ? ((mv & 0xFFFF0000) | (R[rt] & 0x0000FFFF)) >>> 0 : ((mv & 0xFF000000) | (R[rt] & 0x00FFFFFF)) >>> 0; break; }'
new_lwl = 'case 34: { const a = (R[rs] + si) >>> 0, al = a & ~3, bo = a & 3, mv = r32(al); R[rt] = bo === 0 ? mv : bo === 1 ? ((R[rt] & 0x000000FF) | (mv & 0xFFFFFF00)) >>> 0 : bo === 2 ? ((R[rt] & 0x0000FFFF) | (mv & 0xFFFF0000)) >>> 0 : ((R[rt] & 0x00FFFFFF) | (mv & 0xFF000000)) >>> 0; break; }'

# lwr: loads from start of word to addr (low bytes on LE)
# bo=3: full word, bo=2: 3 low bytes, bo=1: 2 low bytes, bo=0: 1 low byte
old_lwr = 'case 38: { const a = (R[rs] + si) >>> 0, al = a & ~3, bo = a & 3, mv = r32(al); R[rt] = bo === 3 ? mv : bo === 2 ? ((R[rt] & 0xFF000000) | (mv & 0x00FFFFFF)) >>> 0 : bo === 1 ? ((R[rt] & 0xFFFF0000) | (mv & 0x0000FFFF)) >>> 0 : ((R[rt] & 0xFFFFFF00) | (mv & 0x000000FF)) >>> 0; break; }'
new_lwr = 'case 38: { const a = (R[rs] + si) >>> 0, al = a & ~3, bo = a & 3, mv = r32(al); R[rt] = bo === 3 ? mv : bo === 2 ? ((R[rt] & 0xFF000000) | (mv & 0x00FFFFFF)) >>> 0 : bo === 1 ? ((R[rt] & 0xFFFF0000) | (mv & 0x0000FFFF)) >>> 0 : ((R[rt] & 0xFFFFFF00) | (mv & 0x000000FF)) >>> 0; break; }'

# swl: stores high bytes (from addr to end of word)
# bo=0: store full word, bo=1: store 3 high bytes, bo=2: store 2, bo=3: store 1
old_swl = 'case 42: { const a = (R[rs] + si) >>> 0, al = a & ~3, bo = a & 3, old = r32(al), v = R[rt]; w32(al, bo === 3 ? v : bo === 2 ? ((old & 0xFF000000) | (v & 0x00FFFFFF)) >>> 0 : bo === 1 ? ((old & 0xFFFF0000) | (v & 0x0000FFFF)) >>> 0 : ((old & 0xFFFFFF00) | (v & 0x000000FF)) >>> 0); break; }'
new_swl = 'case 42: { const a = (R[rs] + si) >>> 0, al = a & ~3, bo = a & 3, old = r32(al), v = R[rt]; w32(al, bo === 0 ? v : bo === 1 ? ((old & 0x000000FF) | (v & 0xFFFFFF00)) >>> 0 : bo === 2 ? ((old & 0x0000FFFF) | (v & 0xFFFF0000)) >>> 0 : ((old & 0x00FFFFFF) | (v & 0xFF000000)) >>> 0); break; }'

# swr: stores low bytes (from start of word to addr)
# bo=3: store full word, bo=2: store 3 low bytes, bo=1: store 2, bo=0: store 1
old_swr = 'case 46: { const a = (R[rs] + si) >>> 0, al = a & ~3, bo = a & 3, old = r32(al), v = R[rt]; w32(al, bo === 0 ? ((v & 0xFF000000) | (old & 0x00FFFFFF)) >>> 0 : bo === 1 ? ((v & 0xFFFF0000) | (old & 0x0000FFFF)) >>> 0 : bo === 2 ? ((v & 0xFFFFFF00) | (old & 0x000000FF)) >>> 0 : v); break; }'
new_swr = 'case 46: { const a = (R[rs] + si) >>> 0, al = a & ~3, bo = a & 3, old = r32(al), v = R[rt]; w32(al, bo === 3 ? v : bo === 2 ? ((old & 0xFF000000) | (v & 0x00FFFFFF)) >>> 0 : bo === 1 ? ((old & 0xFFFF0000) | (v & 0x0000FFFF)) >>> 0 : ((old & 0xFFFFFF00) | (v & 0x000000FF)) >>> 0); break; }'

for label, old, new in [('lwl', old_lwl, new_lwl), ('lwr', old_lwr, new_lwr), ('swl', old_swl, new_swl), ('swr', old_swr, new_swr)]:
    if old in c:
        c = c.replace(old, new)
        print(f'Fixed {label}')
    else:
        print(f'NOT FOUND: {label}')

with open('/app/vm.js', 'w') as f:
    f.write(c)
print('Done')
PYEOF
",
      "duration": 0.5
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "node -c /app/vm.js && echo 'OK'
",
      "duration": 0.5
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "timeout 15 node vm.js > /tmp/trace6.txt 2>&1; grep -aE '^R fd=|Z_Malloc size' /tmp/trace6.txt | head -10
",
      "duration": 20.0
    }
  ]
}
